---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new language feature, provider, CLI command, or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Fluent Syntax

If this is a language feature, show how it would look in a `.fl` program:

```fluent
-- Show the syntax you'd like to write
Ask my_new_provider to "do something" using image photo and call the result r.
```

## Proposed CLI / API

If this is a CLI or serve-layer change, show the command or HTTP call:

```bash
fluent new-command my_program.fl --option value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you've considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art in other languages, provider documentation, etc.
